---
title: "Federico Sánchez Quinto"
about: 
  id: contact
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round # imagen redonda
  image: people/FedericoSanchez/avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:fsanchez@liigh.unam.mx
    - text: Google Scholar
      icon: mortarboard 
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=eCs-tmMAAAAJ&hl=es
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub 
      href: https://github.com/PopGenEvoLab
    - icon: orcid
      text: ORCID 
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0201-6204     
# page-layout: full
---

:::: {#contact}

## **Join our team!**

We’re looking for enthusiastic students to collaborate on cutting-edge projects. Explore our current work [here](), and if you’d like to be part of it, reach out to us at {{< fa envelope >}} [fsanchez\@liigh.unam.mx](mailto:fsanchez@liigh.unam.mx).

## **¡Únete a nuestro equipo!**

Estamos buscando estudiantes entusiastas para colaborar en proyectos de vanguardia. Explora nuestro trabajo actual [aquí]() y, si te interesa formar parte, escríbenos a {{< fa envelope >}} [fsanchez\@liigh.unam.mx](mailto:fsanchez@liigh.unam.mx).

<br>

##### {{< fa map-location-dot >}} **Laboratorio Internacional de Investigación sobre el Genoma Humano (LIIGH) UNAM**, Blvd. 3001,76230, Campus UNAM 3001, Juriquilla, Querétaro, México.
::::

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| label: make map
library(leaflet)

leaflet() %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  # INFO
  setView(lng = -100.44710424418057, lat = 20.700672551364505, zoom = 15) %>%
  addMarkers(lng = -100.44710424418057, lat = 20.700672551364505,
             popup = "<b>LIIGH-UNAM</b><br> Juriquilla, Querétaro<br> <a href='https://liigh.unam.mx' target='_blank'>Sitio web</a>" )  %>%
  addLabelOnlyMarkers( lng = -100.44710424418057, lat = 20.700672551364505, label = "LIIGH-UNAM", labelOptions = labelOptions(noHide = TRUE) )
```

<br>
